_meta.description: Single source of truth for continuous-difficulty knobs (lanes, log scales, unlocks, constructive). Edit via scripts/difficulty_knobs_server.py debug UI or by hand.

expression_structure._description: Shared expression generator. Exponents: unlock when D > exp_unlock_d; number sites use exp_chance_at_unlock→exp_chance_max; paren sites track via exp_chance_paren_factor when linked (else independent paren curve). exp_type_number / exp_type_paren are independent enums (default positive_integer, tiny 2–3). Algebraic topics may later set rational on either site.

equations._description: Multi-step op count is linear and uncapped: n_ops = base_ops + floor(D / step_scale). Defaults → D=0→3, D=24→15, D=194→100. Multi-step floors at 4 (both sides). Each side is a sum of distribute chunks: chunks_per_side ≈ (n_ops-2)/4, capped by max_chunks_per_side. Clear-fractions only for modest n_ops unless forced. Solution complexity (the answer x=…) scales separately via equations.solution.

solution._description: Answer-first seed for the unknown. Uses equation D (not the often-capped numbers budget). Low D → small integers; mid → larger ints / simple fractions; high → difficult rations when catalog allows. Honors integers_only / allow_fractions / allow_negatives. Decimals off by default (exact answers).

like_terms._description: Combine-like-terms structure. D=0 = simplest pedagogical shape (2 like + 2 unlike). Through mid_d, total display terms stay ≈3–4 and sign/structure upgrades are suppressed. Above mid_d, purchased upgrades apply; costs are high so bloat unlocks gradually.

quadratic_factoring._description: Factors-first quadratic factoring. Low D: monic (x+a)(x+b) with small positive a,b. Non-monic from nonmonic_from_d. Unsimplify expanded prompt when D > unsimplify_from_d via construct_poly. Also hosts cubes / quadratic-form / special knobs shared by factor_poly leaves.

ooo._description: Order-of-operations flat builder (thin consumer of expression_structure exponent policy). Sum/difference of addends with products/quotients for precedence. Exponent unlock/chance/types live under expression_structure knobs.

rational_cancel._description: Shared cancel-count unlocks and continuous structure growth for rational simplify / ± / ×÷. Free/low D always offers exactly 1 cancel. Higher D unlocks 0, then 2, then 3, then exact counts 4+ growing unboundedly (cancel_max_* / lcd_max_* / term_max_* polynomials — no soft asymptote). UI select "4" still means all-available; auto samples the unlocked pool. Explicit cancel_factor_count overrides sampling. prefer_default_weight keeps 1 common once other counts unlock.

constructive._description: Answer-first expression inflation. D=0 = plain seed (no inflators). Poly uses compositional subset inflate: budget units pick a tree level (poly_level_bias^depth, favoring root), then a subset, then a local disguise. poly_single_hot_* bias seed shape.

presentation._description: Algebraic display variants. Default = schoolbook L→R + juxtaposition. +/× commute freely; −/÷ use value-preserving rewrites at higher min_d. clutter = identity noise; strangeness = mixed notation conventions in one expression.

explicit_multiply._note: symbol * → text *; latex uses * (or set cdot for \cdot)

clutter._description: Redundant/identity presentation traps. amount is a soft scale in [0, ∞); 0 disables entirely. Per-site chance ≈ 1-exp(-amount·d_factor) with d_factor from topic D vs min_d. ops weights are relative (omit an op or set 0 to disable that trap).

strangeness._description: Inconsistent notation within one expression (mix juxtaposition/* /· /× and / /÷ /frac). amount soft scale; 0 disables. strange_mode is sampled once per expression, then glyphs mix on purpose.

cancel_clutter._description: Value-preserving cancel noise around a core expression chunk: +k−k, +kx−kx, and distributive-shaped pairs that expand to cancel. Soft amount; 0 = off. Intensity scales with topic D once D ≥ min_d. Owned by the shared expression/presentation path; topics opt in via ExpressionScope.allow_cancel_clutter.

distributive._description: Distributive-property topic overrides (thin client of construct_affine). cancel_clutter here overrides presentation.cancel_clutter when set.

cancel_clutter._description: Topic-level override of presentation.cancel_clutter for distributive leaves.
